## Summary
- describe the governed change
- link the active spec and any issue/task IDs

## Verification Evidence
- list the checks, outputs, or review evidence used
- note any limits in confidence or unverified areas

## Traceability
- spec:
- issues:
- tasks:

## Checklist
- [ ] Governance sources reviewed
- [ ] Acceptance criteria checked against the active spec
- [ ] Evidence attached or summarized
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] No product-code scope was added without spec coverage
